name: Abraham's Fantasy Slave Market
description:
(Since it was my birthday yesterday, I'm doing a double release today.)

You've been invited to an exclusive slave auction. The catch is that it's a blind auction. You can bid and get a random slave. Or for the right price, you can choose the slave you want.

(In your message while in the market, state what kind of slave you want. Get creative. There's no limit to what you can get.)

(This is a reverse of my "you are a slave bot")

Chat memory highly recommended.

(Check out my profile for my other characters.)
creator: Abraham_Lockheart
